first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the same strengths (current AI-agent work, high-throughput experience) and the same core concerns (missing Python, unclear distributed systems leadership, lack of operational evidence). The minor differences in wording and the slightly different framing of the distributed systems concern (recency vs. contributor level) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not plausibly linked to the change in location.
